list.name: repo
list.label: Repository
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT repo_full_name FROM pull_requests ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Fleet summary · $repo   (counts reflect PRs gittensory has OBSERVED — not the full upstream census; see note below)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pull_requests p WHERE p.state='open' AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR p.repo_full_name='$repo')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pull_requests p WHERE p.state='open' AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR p.repo_full_name='$repo')

panels.title: Merged (recorded)
panels.description: Merges gittensory witnessed via webhook — NOT the repo's all-time merged total. Needs the upstream reconcile to match GitHub.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pull_requests p WHERE p.merged_at IS NOT NULL AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR p.repo_full_name='$repo')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pull_requests p WHERE p.merged_at IS NOT NULL AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR p.repo_full_name='$repo')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pull_requests p WHERE p.state='closed' AND p.merged_at IS NULL AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR p.repo_full_name='$repo')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pull_requests p WHERE p.state='closed' AND p.merged_at IS NULL AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR p.repo_full_name='$repo')

panels.title: PRs reviewed
panels.description: Distinct PRs gittensory posted a review on — this IS accurate (it is gittensory's own activity).

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT target_key) AS value FROM audit_events WHERE event_type='github_app.pr_public_surface_published' AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR target_key LIKE '$repo' || '#%')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT target_key) AS value FROM audit_events WHERE event_type='github_app.pr_public_surface_published' AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR target_key LIKE '$repo' || '#%')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pull_requests p WHERE p.state='open' AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR p.repo_full_name='$repo') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM audit_events a WHERE a.event_type='github_app.pr_public_surface_published' AND a.target_key = p.repo_full_name || '#' || p.number)
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pull_requests p WHERE p.state='open' AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR p.repo_full_name='$repo') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM audit_events a WHERE a.event_type='github_app.pr_public_surface_published' AND a.target_key = p.repo_full_name || '#' || p.number)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pull_requests p WHERE p.state='open' AND p.merge_blocked_reason IS NOT NULL AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR p.repo_full_name='$repo')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pull_requests p WHERE p.state='open' AND p.merge_blocked_reason IS NOT NULL AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR p.repo_full_name='$repo')

options.content: > ⚠️ **Data source:** the *Reviewed PRs* counts/log and *Reviews posted* trend are gittensory's own activity and are **accurate**. The *Open / Merged / Closed* tiles count only PRs gittensory observed via webhooks — they do **not** mirror the full upstream GitHub census. → **For the accurate live census (open/merged/closed straight from the GitHub API) + open-PR triage, see the [Upstream PRs & issues (GitHub)](/d/gittensory-github) dashboard.**

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT p.repo_full_name AS "Repository", SUM(CASE WHEN p.state='open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Open", SUM(CASE WHEN p.merged_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Merged", SUM(CASE WHEN p.state='closed' AND p.merged_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Closed", (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.target_key) FROM audit_events a WHERE a.event_type='github_app.pr_public_surface_published' AND a.target_key LIKE p.repo_full_name || '#%') AS "Reviewed", SUM(CASE WHEN p.state='open' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM audit_events a WHERE a.event_type='github_app.pr_public_surface_published' AND a.target_key = p.repo_full_name || '#' || p.number) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Awaiting", SUM(CASE WHEN p.state='open' AND p.merge_blocked_reason IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Blocked" FROM pull_requests p GROUP BY p.repo_full_name ORDER BY "Open" DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT p.repo_full_name AS "Repository", SUM(CASE WHEN p.state='open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Open", SUM(CASE WHEN p.merged_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Merged", SUM(CASE WHEN p.state='closed' AND p.merged_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Closed", (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.target_key) FROM audit_events a WHERE a.event_type='github_app.pr_public_surface_published' AND a.target_key LIKE p.repo_full_name || '#%') AS "Reviewed", SUM(CASE WHEN p.state='open' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM audit_events a WHERE a.event_type='github_app.pr_public_surface_published' AND a.target_key = p.repo_full_name || '#' || p.number) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Awaiting", SUM(CASE WHEN p.state='open' AND p.merge_blocked_reason IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Blocked" FROM pull_requests p GROUP BY p.repo_full_name ORDER BY "Open" DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT p.number AS "PR", p.html_url AS "url", p.repo_full_name AS "repo", substr(p.repo_full_name, instr(p.repo_full_name,'/')+1) AS "Repo", p.title AS "Title", p.author_login AS "Author", CASE WHEN p.merged_at IS NOT NULL THEN '🟣 merged' WHEN p.state='closed' THEN '🔴 closed' ELSE '🟢 open' END AS "Status", COALESCE(o.decision,'—') AS "Outcome", TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(p.linked_issues_json,'[',''),']',''),'"','')) AS "Closes", r.last_reviewed AS "Last reviewed" FROM pull_requests p JOIN (SELECT target_key, MAX(created_at) AS last_reviewed FROM audit_events WHERE event_type='github_app.pr_public_surface_published' GROUP BY target_key) r ON r.target_key = p.repo_full_name || '#' || p.number LEFT JOIN (SELECT target_id, decision FROM review_audit WHERE event_type='pr_outcome') o ON o.target_id = p.repo_full_name || '#' || p.number WHERE ('$repo'='__all__' OR p.repo_full_name='$repo') ORDER BY r.last_reviewed DESC LIMIT 300
targets.queryText: SELECT p.number AS "PR", p.html_url AS "url", p.repo_full_name AS "repo", substr(p.repo_full_name, instr(p.repo_full_name,'/')+1) AS "Repo", p.title AS "Title", p.author_login AS "Author", CASE WHEN p.merged_at IS NOT NULL THEN '🟣 merged' WHEN p.state='closed' THEN '🔴 closed' ELSE '🟢 open' END AS "Status", COALESCE(o.decision,'—') AS "Outcome", TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(p.linked_issues_json,'[',''),']',''),'"','')) AS "Closes", r.last_reviewed AS "Last reviewed" FROM pull_requests p JOIN (SELECT target_key, MAX(created_at) AS last_reviewed FROM audit_events WHERE event_type='github_app.pr_public_surface_published' GROUP BY target_key) r ON r.target_key = p.repo_full_name || '#' || p.number LEFT JOIN (SELECT target_id, decision FROM review_audit WHERE event_type='pr_outcome') o ON o.target_id = p.repo_full_name || '#' || p.number WHERE ('$repo'='__all__' OR p.repo_full_name='$repo') ORDER BY r.last_reviewed DESC LIMIT 300

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%s', date(created_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "reviews posted" FROM audit_events WHERE event_type='github_app.pr_public_surface_published' AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR target_key LIKE '$repo' || '#%') GROUP BY date(created_at) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%s', date(created_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "reviews posted" FROM audit_events WHERE event_type='github_app.pr_public_surface_published' AND ('$repo'='__all__' OR target_key LIKE '$repo' || '#%') GROUP BY date(created_at) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Open-PR backlog per repo (Prometheus trend)
panels.description: Sampled from the gittensory_repo_prs gauges at each /metrics scrape — retains backlog history the point-in-time SQLite panels can't.
